'''''Star Wars Official Poster Monthly'' 2''' was published in November [[1977]] by [[Paradise Press]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*"[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] Lives", by [[John May]]: an extended profile of Darth Vader. This article revealed—almost twenty-eight years before the release of [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Revenge of the Sith'']]—that Vader became a [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] after losing a [[Duel on Mustafar/Legends|duel]] with [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and being severely burned by lava.
*"[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]: Desert Planet at the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Galactic Frontier]]," by [[Michael Marten|Dr. M. F. Marten]]: a profile of the desert planet and its inhabitants.
*"Choreography of a [[Starfighter combat/Legends|Dogfight]]," by [[Jon Trux]]: a behind-the-scenes look at the special effects work filming the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] scenes.
